title: “I Saw A 300ft UFO In The Indonesian Jungle” (Ft. Michael Herrera & UAPGerb)
summary: Michael Herrera, a former Marine, describes witnessing a 300ft octagonal craft in the Indonesian jungle in 2009 during a humanitarian mission. He and his fire team were apprehended by armed American operatives near the craft, which appeared to be loading containers. The interview covers his subsequent meeting with Jake Barber, who revealed details about a program involving psionic assets being transported in the containers.

acronyms.definition: A designated area where helicopters or aircraft can land, in this case a 'hasty LZ' meaning an unprepared, improvised landing zone
A military command and control center
A high-level security classification for intelligence information
A legal contract preventing disclosure of confidential information
A program designation (not the real name) related to screening and transporting individuals with psionic abilities
A light machine gun used by infantry units
Military identification cards carried in the left breast pocket
Climate control system seen on top of the containers being loaded onto the craft

events.description: Michael Herrera witnessed a 300ft octagonal craft in the Indonesian jungle during Operation Katsana humanitarian mission
Michael Herrera first approached Steven Greer at an event in Boulder, Colorado to discuss his experience
Michael Herrera testified at the National Press Club event organized by Steven Greer
Steven Greer hosted a National Press Club panel of whistleblowers including Mark McCandish
Bill Hamilton gave primary witness Brad S to Greer

key_claims.claim: Witnessed a 300ft octagonal craft that was matte black transitioning to light matte gray, with panels that absorbed light like Vantablack
The craft made a bass hum sound and shot off at several thousand miles per hour without creating a sonic boom or disturbing vegetation
Eight armed American operatives apprehended the six Marines, discussed whether to kill them, and used biometric scanning devices
An Air Force Lieutenant Colonel forced the witnesses to sign an NDA threatening prison or execution if they talked
Photos and video taken of the craft were stolen from a locked locker - the camera was returned with battery and memory card missing and rendered non-functional
Jake Barber initially infiltrated Greer's organization on behalf of legacy UFO programs before becoming a whistleblower
The containers being loaded onto the craft contained psionic assets - people with psionic abilities screened from third world countries
AARO put out a report that was completely false about the incident
The craft was definitively man-made reverse-engineered technology, not extraterrestrial
Coming forward has cost him business contracts and money rather than providing financial benefit
